description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels and vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsLight green top, has a round neckline, full buttoned placket, ruffle and lace detail on either side of the placket, cap sleeves which are elasticated on the top and elasticated smocking at the hemlineMaterial and Care100% viscoseHand washDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cold ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
